basics.name: Matteo Ballegeer
basics.label: PhD Researcher in 3D Deep Learning
basics.summary: PhD researcher in the Data Analytics Research Group at Ghent University (CVAMO Core Lab, Flanders Make) developing advanced machine learning algorithms for manufacturing intelligence extraction from CAD geometry. Research focuses on 3D deep learning, geometric deep learning, rotation-invariant models, and explainable AI.

work.name: Ghent University
work.summary: PhD researcher in the Data Analytics Research Group at Ghent University, affiliated with CVAMO Core Lab at Flanders Make. Primary focus on the ManProCAD project developing algorithms to estimate manufacturing effort and cost from 3D CAD designs.
highlights: FoV-Net: Rotation-invariant CAD B-rep learning framework using field-of-view ray casting (accepted to CVPR 2026)
BenDFM: Synthetic CAD dataset and taxonomy for manufacturability assessment in sheet metal bending
Research in 3D deep learning, geometric deep learning, graph neural networks, and explainable AI for CAD/manufacturing

work.name: IPCOM
work.summary: Part-time role (15 hours/week) contributing to ERP system integration and product information management for recently acquired global subsidiaries.
highlights: Streamlined integration of subsidiary ERP systems through centralized hub
Ensured consistency and accuracy of product information across webshops
Enabled customized catalogs and structures for acquired subsidiaries

work.name: Vlerick Business School
work.summary: Supported the Executive Remuneration Research Centre by collecting high-quality data on CEO compensation from annual reports of Europe's 700 largest publicly listed companies.
highlights: Analyzed monetary compensation and remuneration types (performance shares, stock options, etc.)
Built unique dataset serving as selling point for research department
Enhanced understanding of executive compensation practices and annual reports

work.name: element61
work.summary: Developed and evaluated large language model applications for business use cases during internship with data science and analysis team.
highlights: Developed in-house corporate chatbot in MS Teams using OpenAI with real-time data access via internet search API
Integrated vector database and internal corporate data for enhanced context
Evaluated genAI business applications optimized through prompt engineering
Presented insights with positive reception for clarity and structure

work.name: Ipsos
work.summary: One-month student contract at world's 3rd largest market research company, experiencing full innovation research process.
highlights: Checked survey logic and interpreted survey results
Filtered meaningful figures from datasets
Created presentations for client delivery

publications.name: FoV-Net: Rotation-Invariant CAD B-rep Learning via Field-of-View Ray Casting
publications.summary: Rotation-invariant CAD B-rep learning framework using field-of-view ray casting and local reference frames. State-of-the-art performance on B-rep classification and segmentation with improved data efficiency. Manuscript accepted at CVPR 2026.

publications.name: BenDFM: A taxonomy and synthetic CAD dataset for manufacturability assessment in sheet metal bending
publications.publisher: Accepted at Journal of Intelligent Manufacturing
publications.summary: First synthetic dataset for manufacturability assessment in sheet metal bending with 20,000 parts (both manufacturable and unmanufacturable). Includes process-aware bending simulations, multiple manufacturability labels, and benchmarks on state-of-the-art 3D learning architectures. Accepted in Journal of Intelligent Manufacturing.

publications.name: Evaluating the stability of model explanations in instance-dependent cost-sensitive credit scoring
publications.summary: Published with Matthias Bogaert and Dries F. Benoit. Investigates stability of instance-dependent cost-sensitive (IDCS) classifiers and their SHAP/LIME explanations under class imbalance. SJR Q1 (2.239), ABS 4, ABDC A*.

publications.name: Automated data generation for assessing sheet metal bending manufacturability
publications.summary: With Toon Van Camp and Dries Benoit. Conference paper on automated data generation for manufacturing assessment.

highlights: Master's Thesis: Evaluating the stability of model explanations in instance-dependent cost-sensitive credit scoring (18/20)
Elective courses: Deep Learning, Internship
Erasmus+ exchange (5 months)
Equivalent to 842/1000 at Ghent University
Skills: Digital Security Management, Marketing Analytics, Industrial Technology
Skills: Operations Research, Java, Data Analysis, SQL, Financial Analysis, Quantitative Research

awards.title: CVPR 2026 Paper Acceptance
awards.summary: FoV-Net: Rotation-Invariant CAD B-rep Learning via Field-of-View Ray Casting accepted at the International Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026 in Denver, Colorado
